name: k8s
description: Protects Kubernetes clusters from destructive AI operations

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:block-delete-namespace
smartRules.reason: Deleting a namespace destroys all resources inside it — blocked by k8s shield

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:block-delete-all
smartRules.reason: kubectl delete --all is irreversible — blocked by k8s shield

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:block-helm-uninstall
smartRules.reason: helm uninstall removes a release and its resources — blocked by k8s shield

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:review-scale-zero
smartRules.reason: Scaling to zero takes down a workload and requires human approval (k8s shield)

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:review-delete-deployment
smartRules.reason: Deleting a workload requires human approval (k8s shield)

smartRules.name: shield:k8s:review-apply-force
smartRules.reason: Force-apply overwrites live resources and requires human approval (k8s shield)
